svg.title: Certus evolutionary search loop
svg.desc: Four stages arranged at the corners of a cycle: Solution population top-left, Context builder top-right, LLM mutation engine bottom-right, Verify and evaluate bottom-left. Arrows connect them clockwise. A workload spec feeds in from the left, the best system exits to the right, and rejected candidates exit downward.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How is the solution population maintained in Certus?')
sendPrompt('What does the context builder include in its prompt?')
sendPrompt('How does the LLM mutation engine generate new candidates?')
sendPrompt('What does the formal verification gate check in Certus?')
sendPrompt('What does the Certus KV-Cache workload specification include?')
sendPrompt('What does the best generated Certus system look like?')
